nodes.label: AI as efficient first-draft generator
nodes.label_negative: AI as final product without human refinement
nodes.grounding_span: I initially delegate the complete task

nodes.label: AI output personalization and naturalness
nodes.label_negative: AI output as template-like and impersonal
nodes.grounding_span: The responses are becoming more personal and don't just regurgitate the same wording

nodes.label: Human touch in sensitive communications
nodes.grounding_span: I still review all AI products like rec letters to infuse my personality

nodes.label: AI freeing time for personal interaction
nodes.label_negative: AI not used, leading to time scarcity for personal interaction
nodes.grounding_span: Now, I'm able to personally meet with families to review information

nodes.label: AI handling rote administrative tasks
nodes.label_negative: Human spending time on rote administrative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I hope it can handle most of the rote paperwork like rec letters, transcript analysis

nodes.label: Personalized student and family support
nodes.grounding_span: I can gauge their passion, nerves, work ethic, and goals that are rarely evident on paper

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: AI satisfies me on a daily basis since it is able to create a thorough recommendation in seconds

nodes.label: Authentic human connection
nodes.grounding_span: people remember how you make them feel

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as time-saver
nodes.grounding_span: AI satisfies me on a daily basis since it is able to create a thorough recommendation in seconds

nodes.label: Dissatisfaction with colleagues' impersonal AI use
nodes.grounding_span: My colleagues use AI for all their writing components, much to the chagrin of some of our families

nodes.label: Optimistic hope for AI evolution
nodes.grounding_span: I hope it can evolve into more personal writing automatically

nodes.label: Iterative refinement — delegates then collaborates
nodes.grounding_span: I initially delegate the complete task... But I still have not used a product from the first submission; instead, I'll collaborate

nodes.label: Quality-conscious differentiation from peers
nodes.grounding_span: It is for this reason that I still add my own contributions as a final product
